skills.name: Flame Turret
skills.description: Deploy a turret that breathes out flames to create a fire zone and periodically burns targets in range every second.
skills.stance: TwoHandBow Musket TwoHandCannon BowAndShield BowAndArtefact BowAndDagger
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor per second SkillFactor %
Duration CaptionRatio second(s)
Number of target CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Frozen Turret
skills.description: Deploys a turret that creates a Cold Wave zone that slows nearby enemies periodically every 0.5 seconds for its duration and pulls enemy targets to its location.
skills.stance: TwoHandBow Musket TwoHandCannon BowAndShield BowAndArtefact BowAndDagger
skills.effect_text:
Duration CaptionRatio second(s)
Number of target CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Arrow Turret
skills.description: Install a turret that rapidly fires an arrow every 0.5 seconds at the nearest single targeted enemy.
skills.stance: TwoHandBow Musket TwoHandCannon BowAndShield BowAndArtefact BowAndDagger
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor per fire SkillFactor %
Duraton CaptionRatio second(s)
Number of Target(s) CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Retrieve
skills.description: Retrieve all turrets installed by yourself in range. Recover a small amount of SP in proportion to the number of installations retrieved.
skills.stance: TwoHandBow Musket TwoHandCannon BowAndShield BowAndArtefact BowAndDagger
skills.effect_text: Recover 2% of Max.SP per single Turret (Max 8%)

skills.name: Lightning Turret
skills.description: Deploy a turret that deals damage and randomly {#005060}[Stun] targets in its range for a second every 1.5 seconds.
skills.stance: TwoHandBow Musket TwoHandCannon BowAndShield BowAndArtefact BowAndDagger
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor per attack SkillFactor %
Duration CaptionRatio seconds
Number of targets CaptionRatio2
Stun Chance CaptionRatio3 %

skills.name: Buff Turret
skills.description: Deploy a turret that grants a buff to allies in the range for a duration. If you move out of range, the buff is removed.
skills.stance: TwoHandBow Musket TwoHandCannon BowAndShield BowAndArtefact BowAndDagger

skills.name: Fix Kit
skills.description: Repairs turrets within the character's radius, slightly increasing their duration. This skill only applies to your turrets.
skills.stance: TwoHandBow Musket TwoHandCannon BowAndShield BowAndArtefact BowAndDagger

attributes.name: [Arts] Lightning Turret: Wrath of God
attributes.description: * Damage cycle is changed to 5 seconds and the target hit is Stunned by a 100% chance (Certain bosses are not Stunned)

attributes.name: [Arts] Retrieve: Replenish Parts
attributes.description:
* Reduces the Engineer skill cooldown by 1 second per turret, up to a maximum of 4 seconds, in proportion to the number of turrets retrieved

* King Mecha V

* Turret skill

attributes.name: Flame Turret: Knockback
attributes.description:
* Cooldown decreases by 5 seconds instead of the fire knocking back the target.

* The target knocked back is not knocked back again by the turret for 5 seconds.

attributes.name: Flame Turret: Fire Concentration
attributes.description:
* Changes to a AoE damage attack that breathes fire toward nearby targets.

* Damage +15%.

attributes.name: Frozen Turret: Freeze
attributes.description: * Duration of the turret decreases by 5 seconds instead of freezing the targets for 2 seconds

attributes.name: Arrow Turret: Repeating Crossbow
attributes.description:
* The turret spins to attack enemies in a radius every second

* Turret Duration - 5 seconds

* Maximum number of targets 15

attributes.name: Buff Turret: Remove
attributes.description:
* Clears 1 removable debuff from an allied target in range once every 5 seconds (Maintained 15 seconds and activates 3 times)

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Buff Turret: Critical
attributes.description:
* Increase the Minimum Critical Rate of the ally within the range by 15%

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Buff Turret: Debuff
attributes.description:
* Decreases Evasion and Critical Resistance of enemies in range by 15%

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Buff Turret: Protection
attributes.description:
* Increases Critical Resistance by 10% and decreases damage received by 15% from the allies in range

* Increases SP consumption by 50%
